body.query: mutation Scrape { goto(url: "https://news.ycombinator.com", waitUntil: networkIdle) { status } stories: mapSelector(selector: "tr.athing") { title: text(selector: "td.title a.titleline") } }

stories.title: Show HN: Browserless 2.49 ships smart-scrape and crawl
